title: quarto-cli-14365
text:
Preface
This is a Quarto book.
To learn more about Quarto books visit https://quarto.org/docs/books.
Start with the introduction (see also 1  Introduction), then move on to the summary. For additional material, see the resources appendix and Appendix A — Resources.

title: 1  Introduction
text:
1.1 Literate Programming
This is a book created from markdown and executable code.
See Knuth (1984) for additional discussion of literate programming.
The concept of literate programming was introduced by Knuth (1984). For a deeper dive, see the details chapter and Chapter 2. A concise overview is available in the summary, specifically Section 3.1.

title: 1  Introduction
text: Knuth, Donald E. 1984. “Literate Programming.” Comput. J. (USA) 27 (2): 97–111. https://doi.org/10.1093/comjnl/27.2.97.

title: 2  Details
text:
2.1 Extended Discussion
This chapter provides additional details only available in the online version.
See the introduction for the basics (see Chapter 1) and literate programming for background (see Section 1.1).
For answers to common questions, see the FAQ and Appendix B. The resources appendix lists further reading (see Appendix A).

title: 3  Summary
text:
3.1 Overview
In summary, this book has no content whatsoever.
This section provides a brief overview. Refer to the introduction for the full story (Chapter 1) and the references for cited works. See also Section 1.1 for background on literate programming.

title: References
text:
Knuth, Donald E. 1984. “Literate Programming.” Comput.
J. (USA) 27 (2): 97–111. https://doi.org/10.1093/comjnl/27.2.97.

title: Appendix A — Resources
text:
A curated list of resources for further reading.
See the introduction for where to start (Chapter 1) and the summary for a quick overview (Section 3.1).

title: Appendix B — Frequently Asked Questions
text:
Common questions and answers, available only in the online version.
See the summary for a quick overview (Chapter 3) and the details chapter for extended discussion (Section 2.1). The resources appendix has links to external material (see Appendix A).
